articles.author: Ellise Shafer
articles.title: Katy Perry Under Investigation in Australia Over Ruby Rose Sexual Assault Allegations - Variety
articles.description: Katy Perry is being investigated by police in Australia after Ruby Rose accused her of sexual assault.
articles.content: A police investigation is underway in Australia after Katy Perry was accused of sexual assault by “Batgirl” and “Orange Is the New Black” actor Ruby Rose. The pop star has denied the allegations, cal… [+2253 chars]
